---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 📌 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you want to propose.

## 🎯 Use Case

What problem does this solve? Who would benefit?

Example:

- As a user, I want to... so that I can...

## 💡 Suggested Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🤔 Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem?

## 📸 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other apps.

## 🔄 Related Issues

Link to related issues: #123, #456

## ✓ Checklist

- [ ] I've checked if this feature was already suggested
- [ ] I've provided a clear use case
- [ ] I've included mockups or examples (if applicable)
